---
title: "LBA effects"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

This file visualises and summarises parameters from the posterior distribution of the pre-registered LBA model for the individual differences face familiarity study.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

pkgs <- c(
  "EMC2", "tidyverse", "tidybayes", "patchwork", "paletteer", "here"
  )
vapply(
  pkgs, library, logical(1), character.only = TRUE, logical.return = TRUE
  )

theme_set(
  theme_bw() +
    theme(
      text  = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
      title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
)

safe_pal   <- paletteer_d("rcartocolor::Safe", 4)
myColors_1 <- c("novel" = safe_pal[1], "learned" = safe_pal[2])
```

# 1. Load model

```{r}
#| label: load-model

# if (Sys.getenv("OSF_PAT") != "") osfr::osf_auth(Sys.getenv("OSF_PAT"))
# 
# # download if missing
# if (!file.exists(here("exp_1", "models", "LBA_exp1.rds"))) {
#   osfr::osf_retrieve_node("65bt2") |>
#     osfr::osf_ls_files() |>
#     dplyr::filter(name == "exp_1") |>
#     osfr::osf_ls_files() |>
#     osfr::osf_ls_files() |>
#     dplyr::filter(name == "LBA_exp1.rds") |>
#     osfr::osf_download(path = here("exp_1", "models"), conflicts = "overwrite")
# }

LBA_iid <- readRDS("models/LBA_iid.rds")
```

# 2. Wrangle posteriors

```{r}
#| label: wrangle

## col names for map = TRUE
param_cols <- c(
  "v_Snovel_lMTRUE", "v_Snovel_lMFALSE",
  "v_Slearned_lMTRUE", "v_Slearned_lMFALSE",
  "sv_lMTRUE", "B_lRnovel", "B_lRlearned", "A", "t0"
)

# subject-level — alpha, natural scale, drop constant
params <- EMC2::parameters(LBA_iid, selection = "alpha",
                                  N = NULL, map = TRUE) |>
  select(-sv_lMFALSE)

# group-level posteriors - mu, natural scale
params_mu <- EMC2::parameters(LBA_iid, selection = "mu",
                               N = NULL, map = TRUE)

# pid-level posteriors
n_pids  <- length(unique(params$subjects))
n_draws <- nrow(params) / n_pids

theta_pid <- params |>
  as_tibble() |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(param_cols), names_to = "param", values_to = "value") |>
  rename(pid = subjects) |>
  mutate(.draw = rep(1:n_draws, each = length(param_cols), times = n_pids))

# group-level posteriors — mu, natural scale
n_draws_mu <- nrow(params_mu)

theta_group <- params_mu |>
  as_tibble() |>
  mutate(.draw = 1:n_draws_mu) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(param_cols), 
               names_to = "param", 
               values_to = "value")

# quantiles
theta_group_q <- theta_group |>
  group_by(param) |>
  median_qi(value)

theta_pid_q <- theta_pid |>
  group_by(pid, param) |>
  median_qi(value)
```

# 3. All parameters overview

```{r}
#| label: fig-all-params
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 6

ggplot(theta_group, aes(x = value, y = fct_rev(param))) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "Parameter estimate", y = NULL)

ggsave(here("figures", "all_params.jpeg"), width = 8, height = 6)
```

# 4. Threshold

```{r}
#| label: wrangle-threshold

thresh_group <- theta_group |>
  filter(str_detect(param, "B_")) |>
  mutate(
    response = if_else(str_detect(param, "lRlearned"), "learned", "novel"),
    response = factor(response, levels = c("novel", "learned"))
  )

thresh_pid <- theta_pid |>
  filter(str_detect(param, "B_")) |>
  mutate(
    response = if_else(str_detect(param, "lRlearned"), "learned", "novel"),
    response = factor(response, levels = c("novel", "learned"))
  )

thresh_diff_group <- thresh_group |>
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(.draw), names_from = response, values_from = value) |>
  mutate(diff = novel - learned)

thresh_diff_pid <- thresh_pid |>
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(pid, .draw), names_from = response, values_from = value) |>
  mutate(diff = novel - learned)

# quantiles
thresh_diff_group_q <- thresh_diff_group |> median_qi(diff)
thresh_diff_pid_q   <- thresh_diff_pid   |> group_by(pid) |> median_qi(diff)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-threshold
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6

p_thresh_dist <- ggplot(thresh_group, aes(x = value, y = fct_rev(response), fill = response)) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = myColors_1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "darkgrey") +
  labs(x = "Threshold", y = "Response")

p_thresh_diff <- ggplot(thresh_diff_group, aes(x = diff, y = "")) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.7, fill = "#1A7A7A") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "darkgrey") +
  labs(x = "Threshold (novel - learned)", y = NULL)

p_thresh_pid <- ggplot(
  thresh_diff_pid |> mutate(pid = reorder(pid, diff, mean)),
  aes(x = diff, y = pid)
) +
  stat_pointinterval(alpha = 0.5, point_size = 0.5, linewidth = 0.3,
                     colour = "#1A7A7A") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "darkgrey") +
  labs(x = "Threshold (novel - learned)", y = NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text          = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    title         = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y   = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y  = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  )

p_thresh_dist | p_thresh_diff | p_thresh_pid

ggsave(here("figures", "threshold.jpeg"), width = 15, height = 6)
```

# 5. Drift rate

```{r}
#| label: wrangle-drift

drift_group <- theta_group |>
  filter(str_detect(param, "v_S")) |>
  mutate(
    condition = if_else(str_detect(param, "novel"), "novel", "learned"),
    accuracy  = if_else(str_detect(param, "TRUE"), "true", "false"),
    condition = factor(condition, levels = c("novel", "learned")),
    accuracy  = factor(accuracy,  levels = c("false", "true"))
  )

drift_pid <- theta_pid |>
  filter(str_detect(param, "v_S")) |>
  mutate(
    condition = if_else(str_detect(param, "novel"), "novel", "learned"),
    accuracy  = if_else(str_detect(param, "TRUE"), "true", "false"),
    condition = factor(condition, levels = c("novel", "learned")),
    accuracy  = factor(accuracy,  levels = c("false", "true"))
  )

# true - false per condition
drift_acc_diff_group <- drift_group |>
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(.draw, condition), names_from = accuracy, values_from = value) |>
  mutate(diff = true - false)

drift_acc_diff_pid <- drift_pid |>
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(pid, .draw, condition), names_from = accuracy, values_from = value) |>
  mutate(diff = true - false)

# novel - learned contrast
drift_cond_diff_group <- drift_acc_diff_group |>
  pivot_wider(id_cols = .draw, names_from = condition, values_from = diff) |>
  mutate(diff = novel - learned)

drift_cond_diff_pid <- drift_acc_diff_pid |>
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(pid, .draw), names_from = condition, values_from = diff) |>
  mutate(diff = novel - learned)

# quantiles
drift_acc_diff_group_q  <- drift_acc_diff_group  |> group_by(condition) |> median_qi(diff)
drift_cond_diff_group_q <- drift_cond_diff_group |> median_qi(diff)
drift_cond_diff_pid_q   <- drift_cond_diff_pid   |> group_by(pid) |> median_qi(diff)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-drift
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6

p_drift_dist <- ggplot(
  drift_acc_diff_group,
  aes(x = diff, y = fct_rev(condition), fill = condition)
) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = myColors_1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "darkgrey") +
  labs(x = "Drift rate (true - false)", y = "Condition")

p_drift_diff <- ggplot(drift_cond_diff_group, aes(x = diff, y = "")) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.7, fill = "#1A7A7A") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "darkgrey") +
  labs(x = "Drift rate (novel - learned)", y = NULL)

p_drift_pid <- ggplot(
  drift_cond_diff_pid |> mutate(pid = reorder(pid, diff, mean)),
  aes(x = diff, y = pid)
) +
  stat_pointinterval(alpha = 0.5, point_size = 0.5, linewidth = 0.3,
                     colour = "#1A7A7A") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "darkgrey") +
  labs(x = "Drift rate (novel - learned)", y = NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text          = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    title         = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y   = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y  = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  )

p_drift_dist | p_drift_diff | p_drift_pid

ggsave(here("figures", "drift_rate.jpeg"), width = 15, height = 6)
```

# 6. Summary quantiles

```{r}
#| label: quantiles

thresh_diff_group_q
drift_acc_diff_group_q
drift_cond_diff_group_q
```
